### Post by lime4x4 on 2008-01-19
I have a dell computer with built in intel video. Under windows it would do 1680x1050 no problem with gutsy it won't. here is a copy of my xorg file

# xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#

Section "Files"

Section "Module"
	Load		"glx"

	Identifier	"Generic Keyboard"
	Driver		"kbd"

	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc105"
	Option		"XkbLayout"	"us"

	Option		"Emulate3Buttons"	"true"

	Vertrefresh	56.0-75.0

### Post by overdrank on 2008-01-19
Hi and I see fail safe in your xorg and when I have that I reconfigure my xorg and it works.

---
